title: Change The End
description: A texture pack that changes the end by mostly making it more purple and darker
body:
We all know how the end looks like. 
But some may think that it's ugly or just kinda meh.

##  **"Change The End"** tries to tackle this issue.
The colors of the end are now more consistent, with the main ones being purple and green/teal.

It was made for 1.21.5, it could cause issues with older versions but you can try to use it
on them if you want. And if there are enough requests for it i will make versions fully
compatible with other versions.

Enjoy!
